SB Nation Reacts survey: Which Cubs prospect would you not give up in a deadline deal?
Three Potential Astros Paths at the Trade Deadline
news_items.summary: At 48-54 with 13 days until the trade deadline, the Houston Astros find themselves in a historically unusual position: they are farther away from .500 (6 games) than they are from the AL West division lead (3.5 games). So far, nothing about this team says playoffs, yet their proximity to the playoffs and their owner’s […]

news_items.headline: Who’s Hot, Who’s Cold: Blue Jays Batters
news_items.summary: So I thought I’d go through this little exercise just for my own sense of ‘what the hell is going on’. Over the last 22 games, four weeks (with the All Star break in there), the Jays are 7-15. They’ve averaged 3.5 runs a game. Quite the stretch run. The batters are hitting .214/.272/.337….which makes […]
